title: Rich Buttery Russian Rice Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Russian dish featuring Carnaroli rice, this pilaf is perfect for a weeknight dinner. It is made with whole30-friendly ingredients and is kneaded to create a springy texture.
instructions: In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add the Carnaroli rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, water, salt, and pepper, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and let it sit, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Knead the rice mixture for 2 minutes to create a springy texture.
